zh.Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾沃爾維頓
zh.lifeSummary: Richard Cambrae是Roger Cambrae的兒子，於1365年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾沃爾維頓。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1445年在他的家鄉享年80歲。

zh-hans.Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾沃爾維頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Cambrae是Roger Cambrae的儿子，于1365年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾沃爾維頓。他至少有1个女儿。他去世于1445年在他的家乡享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cambrae
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and Oxfordshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the four places called Cambrai in Calvados and Nord (France).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Cambrae was born in 1365, in Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, England as the son of Roger Cambrae. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1445, in his hometown, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Cambrae est né en 1365, à Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, fils de Roger Cambrae. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1445, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Cambrae wurde 1365 in Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, England, als Sohn von Roger Cambrae geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1445 im Alter von 80 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Cambrae è nato il nel 1365 nel Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, England come figlio di Roger Cambrae. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1445, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアウオルバートン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Cambraeは1365年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウオルバートンでRoger Cambraeの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1445年に故郷で80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Cambrae(은)는 1365년 영국 벅잉함실르 울버턴에서 Roger Cambrae의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1445년 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Cambrae nasceu em 1365, em Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra filho de Roger Cambrae. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1445, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Cambrae родился в 1365 г. в местности волвиртон, буккингхамшир, Англия. Его отца звали Roger Cambrae. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1445 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Cambrae nació en 1365, en Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Roger Cambrae. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1445, en su pueblo, a la edad de 80 años.
